reasoning: A Minecraft Movie had a domestic 3-day opening weekend of roughly $157M - $162M in April 2025. It remains the highest of the year, verified to have beaten Lilo & Stitch ($146M), Superman ($125M), and Fantastic Four (~$100-110M). The primary remaining threats in 2025 are Avatar: Fire and Ash (Dec 19) and Zootopia 2. Historically, Avatar movies have massive legs but typically moderate opening weekends relative to their totals (Avatar 2 opened to $134M). While Avatar 3 or Zootopia 2 have a chance of breaking out to $160M+, it is inherently difficult to reach such a colossal number over a 3-day weekend. With Minecraft safely holding the crown past the summer and fall releases, the probability is robustly high, though late-year releases preserve around a 25% chance of an upset.
